name: ai-resume-analyzer
description: Browser-based AI resume analyzer with ATS scoring and OpenAI-backed review.

scripts.validate: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); const server=fs.readFileSync('server.js','utf8'); const api=fs.readFileSync('api/analyze-resume.js','utf8'); const start=html.indexOf('<script>'); const end=html.lastIndexOf('</script>'); if(start<0||end<0||end<=start) throw new Error('script not found'); const client=html.slice(start+8,end); new Function(client); new Function(server); new Function(api); console.log('Validation passed');"
